programs.title: The Truth About Getting Fit At Home
programs.desc: For many people, just six minutes of training a week is enough.Mehreen Baig will check what types of exercises we should do at home.He will talk to scientists and conduct experiments.

programs.title: Embarrassing Bodies
programs.desc: Dr. Christian Jessen and his team of doctors help people suffering from rare and very embarrassing diseases.In this series, medics will face really difficult challenges.

programs.title: Skin A\u0026E
programs.desc: The fourth installment of the program revealing the stories of people struggling with skin diseases.They often cause unpleasant or embarrassing symptoms.A team of dermatologists will try to help patients.

programs.title: 10 Years Younger in 10 Days
programs.desc: Program participants undergo a metamorphosis without the intervention of plastic surgery.In 10 days they regain their youthful appearance and self-confidence.Cherry Healey is witnessing incredible transformations.
